articles.title: Acclaimed Seaport restaurant Chickadee to close after 8 years
articles.description:
The James Beard-nominated Mediterranean restaurant Chickadee will close Saturday, July 18.

The post Acclaimed Seaport restaurant Chickadee to close after 8 years appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chickadee, a James Beard-nominated restaurant, will close on July 18 after 8 years.
The Seaport restaurant was known for its Mediterranean cuisine and local popularity.
Closure affects dining options in the Seaport district for Boston residents.

articles.title: Man charged with boating under the influence after Mass. college student drowns in Connecticut
articles.description:
The two 20-year-olds were on a canoe ride in March when it overturned. One was rescued, while the other disappeared underwater.

The post Man charged with boating under the influence after Mass. college student drowns in Connecticut appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 20-year-old Massachusetts college student drowned during a canoe accident in Connecticut in March.
The canoe overturned, resulting in one student being rescued while the other went missing.
A man has been charged with boating under the influence, raising safety concerns for local waterways.

articles.title: Why has America’s Test Kitchen been laying off staff? Here’s what happened under the company’s private equity owner.
articles.description:
When private equity-owned Marquee Brands bought America’s Test Kitchen in 2023, the new leaders of the Boston food media company assured employees that they hadn’t arrived to make big changes. At the time, executives spoke at a town hall meeting, as former employees have since recalled to the Globe. The remarks included a pledge not […]

The post Why has America’s Test Kitchen been laying off staff? Here’s what happened under the company’s private equity owner. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: America's Test Kitchen, acquired by Marquee Brands in 2023, has begun laying off staff.
Executives previously assured employees of stability during a town hall meeting after the acquisition.
Layoffs may affect local jobs and the Boston food media landscape significantly.

articles.title: From the best trade to the biggest disappointments: Red Sox superlatives at the All-Star break
articles.description:
Categories include a series of "biggest disappointments," but also "Most likely to play a young Nick Offerman in a future film project."

The post From the best trade to the biggest disappointments: Red Sox superlatives at the All-Star break appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox evaluate performance at All-Star break, highlighting key players and trades.
Biggest disappointments include underperforming players, impacting fan expectations for the season.
Fans express mixed feelings as team navigates challenges heading into the second half.

articles.title: Nine years after South End killing, fugitive wanted on murder charge captured in North Carolina
articles.description:
The suspect spent years on the run following a 2017 fatal shooting in Boston before being arrested by U.S. Marshals.

The post Nine years after South End killing, fugitive wanted on murder charge captured in North Carolina appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. Marshals captured fugitive wanted for 2017 South End murder in North Carolina.
The suspect had evaded arrest for nine years after the fatal shooting.
Boston residents may feel increased safety with the suspect finally apprehended.

articles.title: The people keeping Cape Cod’s car culture alive
articles.description:
From decked-out minivans to antique race cars, enthusiasts gather for cruises, car shows, parades, and scenic drives across the Cape.

The post The people keeping Cape Cod’s car culture alive appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Car enthusiasts host events like cruises and shows across Cape Cod, enhancing local tourism.
Antique race cars and minivans attract hundreds of visitors during summer events.
Local businesses benefit from increased foot traffic and sales during car culture gatherings.
